race.description: P Kittel Memorial The Power Of Redarc (Bm58) Hcp
race.comment: IOANE (2) is a distance specialist who brings good Vic figures across. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways. I'M KENNY (14) showed good early dash before tiring late into sixth over 1516m at Gawler last time out. Form here at this journey is handy with three wins from six runs. Capable. SEA ROADS (11) was much better last time at Balaklava when chasing gamely into a close sixth. Should find this easier and keeps the claimer on to get him in well at the weights. HARRINO (7) was a good maiden winner earlier in the prep but hasn't quite been able to go on with it. Keeping safe.
